width.description: VIEWPORT design width in pixels (the browser frame, NOT the world). 9:16 PORTRAIT (432x768) so Scale.FIT FILLS a portrait phone and LETTERBOXES centered on a landscape laptop — one fixed canvas plays on both mobile and desktop. The WORLD a level occupies is the level scene's mapWidth/mapHeight (TopDownLevelData.bounds), which may be LARGER than the viewport — the camera follows the player so the viewport stays full at every scroll position; for a single-screen arena mapWidth/mapHeight == this viewport size. OWNED BY core/gameConfig.json (the infra groups) — a module MUST mirror core's screenSize, never diverge (template-contract §4).

height.description: VIEWPORT design height in pixels. 9:16 portrait (432x768) — see width. OWNED BY core (template-contract §4).

timeLimit.description: Level countdown length in SECONDS for the failModel:'time' family (inert unless failModel === 'time'). Parity with platformer/core.
